problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Metal-organic. Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry directly addresses this.
